rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Component names, ports, and connections must be validated against the authoritative AADL model structure
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architectural scope rules when inserting AGREE contracts
Only reference AADL ports and properties that are explicitly declared in the model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level bindings require valid subcomponent and connection context
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
irrelevant_topics: AGREE clause generation and fusion rules
